metadata.title: Neuro-Symbolic Language Modeling with Automaton-augmented Retrieval

sections.title: Key Idea #1: Pointers Between Examples
content: Encode the training set as linked lists of (key, value, pointer):
This extends kNN-LM (Khandelwal et al., '2020) by adding pointers between consecutive datastore entries.

sections.title: Key Idea #2: Clustering Similar Keys
content: Cluster similar keys into automaton states:

figures.description: Clustering similar keys into automaton states diagram showing connections between names like Joe, Joseph, and Biden

sections.title: RETOMATON
content: Nodes:clusters of training examples, encoded by the LMEdges:pointers between consecutive examples, shared in clusterWeights:-||h_t, key||_2
